overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a grassy prairie toward an abandoned wooden settlement. The character disappears from view after 8 seconds, and the camera continues moving through tall grass toward distant wooden structures with mountains in the background.

events.description: character takes a drink from a flask while standing
character disappears from view and camera continues moving forward at ground level

agents.ego_description: character takes a drink from a flask then walks steadily along the dirt path through tall grass

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
rocky mountain peaks visible in the distance under cloudy skies
long wooden structure spanning across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a cowboy character standing in a grassy prairie. The character takes a drink from a flask, then begins walking forward along a dirt path. The camera follows from behind as the character moves through the tall grass with mountains and a wooden aqueduct visible in the distance.

events.description: horses become visible grazing in the field near the settlement

agents.ego_description: camera continues moving forward through tall grass toward the distant abandoned settlement

notable_agents.action: horses grazing near the wooden structures of the settlement

entered.detail: cluster of wooden buildings and mining structures with a tall tower
tall wooden derrick or watchtower structure

segments.scene_description: After the character exits the frame, the camera continues moving forward through the tall grass toward an abandoned wooden settlement. The dirt path becomes more prominent in the foreground as the camera approaches. Horses can be seen grazing in the distance to the right. The wooden structures, including an aqueduct and a tall tower, grow larger as the camera advances toward the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grassy prairie that gradually closes in on an abandoned wooden settlement. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy drinking from a flask before he starts walking forward along a dirt path. As the character moves through the tall grass toward distant mountains and a wooden aqueduct, he eventually exits the frame, leaving the camera to advance independently. The scene then shifts focus to the terrain as the dirt path becomes more prominent and grazing horses appear to the right. Finally, the camera pushes forward until the wooden structures, including a tall tower and the aqueduct, grow larger and dominate the horizon.
